text_template: Anyone managing cash flow knows growth is expensive and flexibility matters. The American Express corporate program helps businesses manage spending and payment timing to support healthier working capital. Chat with a member of the American Express team to find the card program that's best for your needs. Learn more at AmericanExpress.com slash corporate. Terms apply.
